zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes de Vaux於1207年出生在英國波藍德易爾頓時，她的父親Robert de Vaux VI38歲，母親Maud de Vaux of Cumberland32歲。她和Walran de Horton至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。她於1269年住在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德霍頓。她去世於1269年10月28日享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes de Vaux于1207年出生在英国波藍德易爾頓时，她的父亲Robert de Vaux VI38岁，母亲Maud de Vaux of Cumberland32岁。她和Walran de Horton至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。她于1269年住在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德霍頓。她去世于1269年10月28日享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vaux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of various places in northern France called Vaux, from the Old French plural of val ‘valley’. Compare English Vause and French Devaux .

History: Richard Vaux (1749–90) emigrated from Sussex, England, to Philadelphia, PA, in early youth. Calvert Vaux, landscape architect, emigrated from London, England, to America in 1850 and designed several major US parks, including Central Park in New York City (with Frederick Olmstead). — This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors (along with its variant Veaux and altered form Devoe ) and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Vause
meanings: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Vaux (see Vaux ), a common French placename, singular and plural of val ‘valley’, the plural form being Latinized in surnames as de Vallibus. Norman lords with this surname are recorded in 12th- and early 13th-century records in Cumberland (Irthington), Devon (Farwood, in Colyton), East Yorkshire (Warter), Essex (Belchamp), and Leicestershire (Belvoir). Compare Vale .

nickname perhaps from Middle English fals, faus, vaus (Old French fals, faus, Old English fals) ‘deceitful, disloyal, dishonest, mendacious’, but it is more likely the name arises from 1, with the common Anglo-Norman French substitution of le for de in their surname.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes de Vaux was born in 1207, in Irthington, Cumberland, England, her father, Robert de Vaux VI, was 38 and her mother, Maud de Vaux of Cumberland, was 32. She had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Walran de Horton. She lived in Horton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom in 1269. She died on 28 October 1269, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes de Vaux est née en 1207, à Irthington, Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Vaux VI, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Maud de Vaux of Cumberland, avait 32 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Walran de Horton. Elle a vécu à Horton, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1269. Elle est décédée le 28 octobre 1269, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes de Vaux 1207 in Irthington, Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Vaux VI 38 und ihre Mutter Maud de Vaux of Cumberland 32. Sie hatte mit Walran de Horton mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1269 hat sie in Horton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom gelebt. Sie starb am 28. Oktober 1269 im Alter von 62 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Vaux è nata il nel 1207 nel Irthington, Cumberland, England, sua padre, Robert de Vaux VI, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Maud de Vaux of Cumberland, aveva 32 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Walran de Horton. Vissuto a Horton, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1269. Morì il 28 ottobre 1269, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Vauxが1207年にイギリスクウンバーランドイルスイントンで生まれた時，父Robert de Vaux VIは38歳，母Maud de Vaux of Cumberlandは32歳であった。彼女はWalran de Hortonとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1269年にはイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドホールトンに住んでいた。彼女は1269年10月28日に62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Vaux(이)가 1207년 영국 c벌랜드 이르스잉턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Vaux VI(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud de Vaux of Cumberland(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 Walran de Horton(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1269년도에 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 호르턴에서 살았다. 그녀는 1269년 10월 28일 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Vaux nasceu em 1207, em Irthington, Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Vaux VI, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Vaux of Cumberland, tinha 32 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Walran de Horton. Ela viveu em Horton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1269. Ela faleceu em 28 de outubro de 1269, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes de Vaux родилась в 1207 г. в местности иртингтон, кумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Vaux VI было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Vaux of Cumberland, 32. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Walran de Horton. Она жила в местности хауртон, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в 1269 году. Она умерла 28 октября 1269 г. в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes de Vaux nació en 1207, en Irthington, Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Vaux VI, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Maud de Vaux of Cumberland, tenía 32 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Walran de Horton. Vivió en Horton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1269. Murió el 28 de octubre de 1269, a la edad de 62 años.
